title: lannea schimperi var. stolzii
intro: Lannea schimperi var. stolzii, also known as the Schimperi Lannea or Stolz's Lannea, is a plant species in the Anacardiaceae family, characterized by its small shrubs and edible fruits. Traditionally, the plant is used in various herbal remedies due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lannea schimperi var. stolzii include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Lannea schimperi var. stolzii is often prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, and extracts, highlighting its versatility in herbal medicine.
